## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: 78 clicks last week (30 from appointment scheduling, 28 from answering services)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [SEO progress: 60+ articles ranking in top 10 for targeted keywords; impressions up 10%](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Action items: Fix UI issues (H1 tags, repeated headings), implement internal linking strategy, explore tag management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [New content focus: Generic topics on appointment scheduling/answering services, Boulevard-related content](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Topics

### Recent Business Trips and Upcoming Conferences

  - [Bob visited customers in Houston and Raleigh](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Upcoming speaking engagements:](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Large conference in June (5,000 attendees, keynote stage)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Quillio's conference (1-2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [Microsoft Build (2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [253 topics selected, 203 developed, 172 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Last batch of BPO articles not yet indexed](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focusing on generic topics (e.g., types/benefits of appointment scheduling software)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [New content cluster: Boulevard (company/product) and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Performance:](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [78 clicks last week (30 from appointment scheduling, 28 from answering services)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Impressions increased by 10%](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [60+ articles ranking in top 10 for targeted keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Strong performance for niche, company-specific keywords (e.g., "answering services for Cisco")](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [UI fixes needed:](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Ensure only one H1 per page](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Fix repeated headings in template](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Implement collapsible table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Add cluster links to footer resources on all pages](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Create topic-based interlinking within clusters (e.g., link all Genesis-related articles)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Tag management:](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [Explore automated tagging solutions using AI/ML](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Consider using API to update tags programmatically in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

### Partnership Considerations

  - [Maintain positive tone when discussing potential partners (e.g., Boulevard, MindBody)](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Careful approach to content about companies without current integrations](https://fathom.video/share/wNmtgrx466CLdkhhXH5zydtGPSf4A9Sw?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
